tools_used: CourtListener MCP opinion search and item retrieval
helpful: The provisioned petition and questions presented supplied the complete cert-stage framing.
The snapshot exposed the response-request signal and current response deadline.
The statpack supplied paid-petition and originating-circuit calibration.
CourtListener supplied the majority and dissent below for a less one-sided account than the petition.
gaps: The statpack does not provide an empirical grant rate conditioned on a call for response after waiver.
CourtListener search exposed cluster URL identifiers without opinion-record identifiers, requiring a separate cluster lookup.
notes: The brief in opposition was not yet due, so no respondent-side cert filing could be provisioned; the forecast discounts the petition's characterization accordingly.
